nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft API CPU alta
nrqlConditions.query: FROM K8sContainerSample SELECT average(cpuUsedCores) WHERE clusterName = 'mechcraft-aks' AND podName LIKE 'mechcraft-api-%'

nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft API memoria alta
nrqlConditions.query: FROM K8sContainerSample SELECT average(memoryWorkingSetBytes / 1048576) WHERE clusterName = 'mechcraft-aks' AND podName LIKE 'mechcraft-api-%'

nrqlConditions.name: Pods indisponiveis no deployment
nrqlConditions.query: FROM K8sDeploymentSample SELECT latest(podsUnavailable) WHERE clusterName = 'mechcraft-aks' AND deploymentName = 'mechcraft-api'

nrqlConditions.name: Falha no processamento de ordens de servico
nrqlConditions.query: FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE message LIKE '%integration-error%' OR message LIKE '%webhook%'
